tier: Tier 7.7z-r3 - v2.6 NAB Streaming Anomaly Adapter
claim: Tier 7.7z-r3 applies v2.6 edge-of-chaos + ridge readout to 5 NAB streaming anomaly detection files, seeds 42/43/44. TravelTime_387 shows strong detection signal (1.56x error ratio, 3/3 seeds). Four other streams show weak/unreliable signal (1.02-1.19x). Ambient temperature is counter-signal (0.46x, model predicts better during anomalies). NAB partial/local signal — same pattern as v2.3. Consistent with bounded capability: edge-of-chaos helps chaotic/dynamic tasks but not gradual-drift anomaly patterns.
caveat: NAB adapter scoring only. Not a full NAB benchmark. Not public usefulness proof. Not a baseline freeze.
